'''鈭歭-z-w''' ('''kalazaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immew|immew]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immew|immew]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-z-w
|-
! Lemma
| kalazaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilazaw|thilazaw]] || [[word:jilazaw|jilazaw]] || [[word:shilazaw|shilazaw]] || [[word:kilazaw|kilazaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulazaw|thuthulazaw]] || [[word:jujulazaw|jujulazaw]] || [[word:shushulazaw|shushulazaw]] || [[word:kukulazaw|kukulazaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulazaw|thulazaw]] || [[word:julazaw|julazaw]] || [[word:shulazaw|shulazaw]] || [[word:kulazaw|kulazaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulazaw|thulazaw]] || [[word:julazaw|julazaw]] || [[word:shulazaw|shulazaw]] || [[word:kulazaw|kulazaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelazaw|thelazaw]] || [[word:jelazaw|jelazaw]] || [[word:shelazaw|shelazaw]] || [[word:kelazaw|kelazaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholazaw|thotholazaw]] || [[word:jojolazaw|jojolazaw]] || [[word:shosholazaw|shosholazaw]] || [[word:kokolazaw|kokolazaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholazaw|tholazaw]] || [[word:jolazaw|jolazaw]] || [[word:sholazaw|sholazaw]] || [[word:kolazaw|kolazaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholazaw|tholazaw]] || [[word:jolazaw|jolazaw]] || [[word:sholazaw|sholazaw]] || [[word:kolazaw|kolazaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lazaw|th忙lazaw]] || [[word:j忙lazaw|j忙lazaw]] || [[word:sh忙lazaw|sh忙lazaw]] || [[word:k忙lazaw|k忙lazaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalazaw|thathalazaw]] || [[word:jajalazaw|jajalazaw]] || [[word:shashalazaw|shashalazaw]] || [[word:kakalazaw|kakalazaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalazaw|thalazaw]] || [[word:jalazaw|jalazaw]] || [[word:shalazaw|shalazaw]] || [[word:kalazaw|kalazaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalazaw|thalazaw]] || [[word:jalazaw|jalazaw]] || [[word:shalazaw|shalazaw]] || [[word:kalazaw|kalazaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalazaw|shalazaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalazaw|goshalazaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalazaw|gokishalazaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalazawn眉|shalazawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalazawnkn眉|goshalazawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazawn眉|gokishalazawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalazawsh毛|shalazawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalazawnksh毛|goshalazawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalazawsh毛|gokishalazawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazawro|shalazawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazawnkro|goshalazawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazawro|gokishalazawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazawmu|shalazawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazawnkmu|goshalazawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazawmu|gokishalazawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalazawsher|shalazawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalazawnksher|goshalazawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalazawsher|gokishalazawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalazawng|shalazawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalazawnkng|goshalazawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalazawng|gokishalazawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalazawya|shalazawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalazawnkya|goshalazawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalazawya|gokishalazawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalazawyam|shalazawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalazawnkyam|goshalazawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalazawyam|gokishalazawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazawn眉sh毛|shalazawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazawnkn眉sh毛|goshalazawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazawn眉sh毛|gokishalazawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazawn眉ro|shalazawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazawnkn眉ro|goshalazawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazawn眉ro|gokishalazawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazawn眉mu|shalazawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazawnkn眉mu|goshalazawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazawn眉mu|gokishalazawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazawsh毛n眉|shalazawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazawnksh毛n眉|goshalazawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazawsh毛n眉|gokishalazawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazawsh毛ro|shalazawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazawnksh毛ro|goshalazawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazawsh毛ro|gokishalazawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazawsh毛mu|shalazawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazawnksh毛mu|goshalazawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazawsh毛mu|gokishalazawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazawron眉|shalazawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazawnkron眉|goshalazawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazawron眉|gokishalazawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazawrosh毛|shalazawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazawnkrosh毛|goshalazawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazawrosh毛|gokishalazawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazawromu|shalazawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazawnkromu|goshalazawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazawromu|gokishalazawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazawmun眉|shalazawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazawnkmun眉|goshalazawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazawmun眉|gokishalazawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazawmush毛|shalazawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazawnkmush毛|goshalazawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazawmush毛|gokishalazawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazawmuro|shalazawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazawnkmuro|goshalazawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazawmuro|gokishalazawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
